title: zanthoxylum trifoliatum
intro: Zanthoxylum trifoliatum, also known as Mexican Prickly Ash, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum trifoliatum include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat various respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum trifoliatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
